title: Shopify Product Description Packs for E-Commerce
description: 30 prompts for e-commerce store owners to write SEO-optimized, benefit-focused product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.
gumroad_description:
STRUGGLING TO WRITE PRODUCT DESCRIPTIONS THAT ACTUALLY SELL?

Most e-commerce store owners either ghost their product pages or write boring, feature-heavy descriptions that put buyers to sleep. This pack solves that problem.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Shopify store owners tired of leaving money on the table with weak product copy
— Solopreneurs who know their products are great but can't articulate why customers need them
— Busy sellers who want proven description templates that work, not generic advice

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 30 battle-tested prompts designed to unlock benefit-focused, SEO-smart descriptions
— Ready-to-use formats in Markdown and JSON that paste straight into ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini
— Prompts for every product type: apparel, digital goods, home goods, niche items, and more
— Built-in hooks, pain-point positioning, and conversion psychology baked into every template
— Copy that turns browsers into buyers by speaking directly to customer problems

These prompts have been refined across dozens of successful stores. Use them once, or customize them for every product you launch.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
